basic_details.job_title: NFDC Senior Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Film Development Corporation (NFDC) Senior Executive (Finance & Accounts) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nfdcindia.com. A total of 1 Senior Executive (Finance & Accounts) vacancy has been announced through the NFDC Senior Executive Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NFDC Senior Executive (Finance & Accounts) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFDC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NFDC Senior Executive Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NFDC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NFDC Senior Executive Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NFDC Senior Executive (Finance & Accounts) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFDC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NFDC Senior Executive Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NFDC Senior Executive (Finance & Accounts) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the NFDC Senior Executive (Finance & Accounts) recruitment is 24-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by NFDC?
faq.answer: NFDC has released a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Senior Executive (Finance & Accounts).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Executive (Finance & Accounts) post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Senior Executive (Finance & Accounts) post is CA/ICWA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this recruitment is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Executive (Finance & Accounts) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 70000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this NFDC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity released by the National Film Development Corporation.

faq.question: Q9. In which city is the job located?
faq.answer: The job is located in New Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is ADV-60/Contractual/08/07/2026.
